title: Full Project Catalogue

fields.vision: This catalogue brings the deeper nikmurano.com project pages into this standalone professional package as in-page project sections.
fields.mechanism: The page works by linking visible components, source roles, and next-step gates. The rendered page contains build-state evidence; the next pass should name the component files, routes, packets, ledgers, or datasets more plainly.
fields.built_components: The rendered page contains build-state evidence; the next pass should name the component files, routes, packets, ledgers, or datasets more plainly.
fields.source_utilization: Source use is organized by role: method authorities, domain evidence, technical background, implementation evidence, and claim limits. The page should show why each source matters; direct quotations and stronger factual claims still require exact passage anchors before publication.
fields.plan: The next pass should convert the existing implementation language into phase gates, named dependencies, and evidence of completion.
fields.status: Status: The rendered page contains build-state evidence; the next pass should name the component files, routes, packets, ledgers, or datasets more plainly.
fields.remaining_gaps: Remaining gaps: convert the existing implementation language into phase gates, named dependencies, and evidence of completion.
fields.detailed_source_vision: This catalogue brings the deeper nikmurano.com project pages into this standalone professional package as in-page project sections. It removes screenshot dependence and heavyweight artwork so the upload can remain small while preserving project mechanisms, room structure, source state, and review status.
fields.detailed_source_mechanism: The page works by linking visible components, source roles, and next-step gates. The rendered page contains build-state evidence; the next pass should name the component files, routes, packets, ledgers, or datasets more plainly.

maintenance_rule: Update this blueprint before strengthening public claims on the website. Do not use word count, module count, or status percentage as a substitute for concrete project substance.
claim_ceiling_rule: Public claims may rise only when the built components, source use, status, and remaining gaps are updated here and reflected in the rendered page.

public_standard_check.Vision: This document supports the public account of Blueprint by preserving the project purpose, reader-facing claim, and professional-portfolio role.
public_standard_check.Mechanism: It connects source material, project components, implementation state, and next actions so the work can be inspected rather than merely asserted.
public_standard_check.What is built: The supporting evidence is the named page, blueprint, packet, project file, source record, or implementation page described in the document.
public_standard_check.Source use: Sources are used as method and source background, domain grounding, or project history; direct quotation and stronger factual claims require passage-level review.
public_standard_check.Plan: Bind claims to exact source anchors, visible implementation evidence, or a narrower public claim.
public_standard_check.Status: Current support record for the professional package unless explicitly marked archival.
public_standard_check.Remaining Gaps: Passage-level source check, implementation verification, citation cleanup, and proportional public wording remain open where evidence is incomplete.

public_pitch.what_it_is: This catalogue brings the deeper nikmurano.com project pages into this standalone professional package as in-page project sections.
public_pitch.distinctive_mechanism: The page works by linking visible components, source roles, and next-step gates. The rendered page contains build-state evidence; the next pass should name the component files, routes, packets, ledgers, or datasets more plainly.
public_pitch.why_it_matters: It shows the utility of Full Project Catalogue by tying the project purpose to the mechanism that makes it inspectable, reusable, or professionally valuable.
public_pitch.pitch_integrity_note: Mechanism-first public pitch inserted after the Nexus Lab mechanism-erasure audit on 2026-05-13; source basis: blueprint detailed source fields.

pitch_integrity_audit.standard: object, distinctive mechanism, value, built state, and non-overclaim discipline must be visible.

researcher_process_map.summary: This catalogue brings the deeper nikmurano.com project pages into this standalone professional package as in-page project sections.
researcher_process_map.final_use_case: It shows the utility of Full Project Catalogue by tying the project purpose to the mechanism that makes it inspectable, reusable, or professionally valuable.
